item.title: 准备提前回去了，30度的温度有点小热，特别是对冬天出生的宝宝而言。今天就当压力测试了，改天再进行。 https://t.co/TCZEbRGWs7

item.title:
Released wacrawl 0.2.0.
New: encrypted Git backup/restore for WhatsApp Desktop archives. `wacrawl b...
item.description:
Released wacrawl 0.2.0.
New: encrypted Git backup/restore for WhatsApp Desktop archives. `wacrawl backup push` writes age-encrypted shards to GitHub; `backup pull` decrypts, verifies, and restores locally. https://t.co/gzCQO6eSAe
--- @steipete | ❤️ 76 | 🔁 4 | 💬 11 | 👁 7035
item.author: @steipete
